rows.finalText: For "What is the next right step in my calling", the cards keep circling back to purpose / calling themes with a right path emphasis. Past opens with Tower (19), putting you may need stronger standards and boundaries in focus and setting the emotional weather around the reading. Tower often points to distance, standards, official structure, and the part of the situation governed by rules rather than mood in your calling. Present turns on Crossroads (22), bringing multiple paths require explicit criteria to the hinge of the reading and asking for one careful adjustment. Crossroads colors your calling through a vocational fork in the road, where not every path deserves the same loyalty or sacrifice. The likely direction shows in Future through Coffin (8), and it suggests release an outdated pattern gracefully once the pivot is met directly. Here, Coffin emphasizes the part of the old path that has already finished. The path becomes clearest where Tower (19) meets Crossroads (22): a blend of institution and choice, asking you to balance professionalism with connection while staying alert to analysis paralysis. Tower (19) with Crossroads (22) keep emphasizing a blend of institution and choice, asking you to balance professionalism with connection while staying alert to analysis paralysis. Choose the path aligned with values so Coffin (8) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
